name: Subros Limited
summary: Subros Limited manufactures and sells thermal products for automotive applications in India. The company offers compressors; automotive condensers; heating, ventilating, and air conditioning (AC) systems, such as heaters, evaporators, and blower units; tubes and hoses; bus ACs; driver cabin ACs for railway engines; commercial and residential ACs; water dispensers; transport refrigeration systems; truck cabin AC systems; and off-roader AC systems. It also exports its products. Subros Limited was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in New Delhi, India.
